title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SITIO VICTORY, MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO DOÃA ROSARIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1689 / 48 OG No. 5, 1696 (May, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 693, May 09, 1952 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SITIO VICTORY, MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO DOÃA ROSARIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of sitio Victory, Municipality of Cabadbaran, Province of Agusan, is hereby changed to Doña Rosario.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 9, 1952.
